events.description: Alice celebrates village milestone by gathering extra wood at forest edge — harvests 8 wood (+wood reserves recovering) — teamwork spirit high after reaching 350 gold together
Bob crafts 5 quality tools (+20 gold) — new stone-tool hybrid design proving popular — village gold at 368 as forge productivity continues strong
Carol completes large remedy batch with returning merchants — 'Remedy of the Northern Spring' 3 batches (+18 gold) — sustainable supply chain milestone achieved
🎉 Village Gold Crosses 350! Alice's extra foraging, Bob's hybrid tools (+20g), Carol's bulk remedy trade (+18g) — village economy enters new chapter. Three pillars in full harmony.
